vocab.meaning: dấu hiệu đặc trưng của sự thành công
vocab.example: In many cultures, owning a high-end timepiece is viewed as a hallmark of success and personal achievement.

vocab.meaning: độ chính xác cực cao về thời gian
vocab.example: Watch connoisseurs often invest in expensive brands because they value the chronometric precision that only elite movements can offer.

vocab.meaning: tượng trưng cho năng lực/sức mạnh tài chính
vocab.example: For some, wearing a luxury watch is a subtle way to symbolize financial prowess without being overtly boastful.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thẩm mỹ tinh tế/tuyệt mỹ
vocab.example: Beyond the function, premium watches are sought after for their exquisite aesthetic appeal and the way they complement a formal outfit.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng tương xứng vật gia bảo (bền bỉ để truyền lại)
vocab.example: Many people buy expensive watches as heirloom-quality pieces that can be passed down to future generations.
